description: Fix 5 issues from code review: (1) broken param binding in audit-logs route, (2) add rate limiting to CRUD POST endpoints, (3) add pagination to list endpoints, (4) create missing service-categories [id] route, (5) verify architecture map accuracy.
steps: Step 1: Rewrite superadmin/audit-logs route to use Drizzle sql interpolation instead of broken raw param binding
Step 2: Add checkRateLimit to POST handlers in products, segments, service-categories, price-books routes
Step 3: Add limit/offset pagination support to GET handlers in products, segments, service-categories, price-books routes
Step 4: Create app/api/tenant/service-categories/[id]/route.ts with GET, PATCH, DELETE following price-books pattern
Step 5: Verify FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md accuracy for service_categories status
acceptance_criteria: superadmin/audit-logs route uses sql template interpolation for dynamic WHERE conditions
All four new CRUD POST endpoints have checkRateLimit calls
All four new GET list endpoints support limit/offset query params with max 200
service-categories/[id]/route.ts exists with GET, PATCH, DELETE handlers
